message:
fix(generators): propagate star_graph warnings and use mutable binding in BA generator

Make the warnings vec mutable so star_graph seed warnings are properly
merged via extend() rather than silently dropped. Also remove
unnecessary mut on the star_graph report binding since only the graph
is moved out.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
